attacking_style: Defensive climber who focuses on limiting losses rather than initiating attacks. Capable of following dangerous moves on final climbs when GC rivals accelerate.
team_tactics: Insufficient data to establish team tactical patterns across multiple races.
terrain_preference: Sustained final climbs where damage limitation and steady pace are crucial. Less effective on explosive, punchy terrain requiring repeated accelerations.
vulnerability: Lacks explosive power to initiate winning attacks against top GC rivals. Reactive riding style limits ability to take time rather than defend position.
key_patterns: Reactive climber: follows attacks rather than initiating, maintaining contact with accelerations
Strong final climb resilience: only rider staying within 15 seconds of Evenepoel's attack
Damage limitation specialist: minimizes time losses (28s) when unable to counter-attack
form_trajectory: unknown: single race observation insufficient to determine trajectory, though showed competitive GC climbing ability
